question.label: Highest-leverage work
question.name: When you say 'highest-leverage work,' what work do you think that is here?
question.description: Drills into his own definition of higher-leverage Principal work before moving on.

answer: I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.

assessment.note: He can define Principal impact abstractly but says this team's bar feels fuzzy, which is a strong clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Thread follow
new_queue.name: describe rincipal impact — can you say more about what that means for you right now?

new_queue.label: Visible leverage
new_queue.name: Where do you think your leverage is most visible in the work today?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Questioning cadence
new_queue.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
